subject: Re: M crashing when adding the data source
body:
Hi, 
I had the same error message when adding trying to add a specific data 
source but not other ones. I was able to solve it by deleting some hidden 
tomostar and xml files that were read in instead of the correct files.
Hope this helps.
Best,
Jan Philipp

Digvijay Singh schrieb am Mittwoch, 19. Januar 2022 um 04:22:20 UTC+1:

Hi everyone

The M crashes when I am adding the data source from the previous.settings 
file with the following error. I had toggled to the .tomostar in WARP to 
update the previous.settings file with .tomostar. 

Error in crash.txt. A screenshot of the error is also attached. 

Any advice? Thanks
